title: Marketing repair: execution board latest sync repair
summary: Patched the marketing runtime so outcome_execution_board_latest now syncs from the lane that actually ran, preventing stale execution-board status during hold-window and reused-guard runs.

why_this_action.summary: No truthful new outbound lane exists before the current 08:57 CEST release, so improving shared runtime truth was the highest-leverage move.
supporting_reasons: The execution board is a shared findings artifact used to avoid siloed packets.
A stale outcome_execution_board_latest artifact can mislead the next run about what lane actually executed.
Current adoption remains flat on Codeberg, so fake progress prevention matters more than another duplicate packet refresh.

expected_outcome: Future marketing runs consume a truthful latest execution-board artifact instead of stale lane state, improving post-hold execution quality.
